notes: Sunday family hike. Megan and kids. Cool and wet. Kyle in the carrier for the back half. Mossy and quiet.

Quick loop, just Megan and me. Kids at Carol's for the afternoon.

route: Wildwood Trail, NW 53rd to Germantown Rd
notes: Solo, early start. Brought the camera for once.
Family outing. Hannah walked the whole thing herself. Kyle lasted about a mile then rode on my back.
